name: Potential Privilege Escalation via Local Kerberos Relay over LDAP
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Elastic, @SBousseaden
SIGMA Title: Potential Privilege Escalation via Local Kerberos Relay over LDAP
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious local successful logon event where the Logon Package is Kerberos, the remote address is set to localhost, and the target user SID is the built-in local Administrator account.
This may indicate an attempt to leverage a Kerberos relay attack variant that can be used to elevate privilege locally from a domain joined limited user to local System privileges.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=3 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%kerberos%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%127.0.0.1%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-21-%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-500%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Privilege Escalation via Local Kerberos Relay over LDAP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=3 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%kerberos%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%127.0.0.1%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-21-%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-500%' AQL filter query
